text: Visit summary: The customer reported chest pain after exercise. Symptom severity was moderate. Blood pressure was 145/92. The measurement was taken while seated. They were advised to rest and schedule a follow-up appointment.

Support ticket: The user cannot log in after password reset. Error message says account temporarily locked. Support recommended waiting 15 minutes and trying again. The temporary lock expires automatically.

Project note: The migration finished on Friday. Two downstream jobs failed because the customer table was missing an index. The index was rebuilt overnight. Database latency returned to normal by morning.
